resources.string: People and open source projects that helped the development of MT Manager.
Do you want to add the selected %d files to bookmarks?
All unmodified classes have been selected.
You are already in this class
You are already in this file

This function can analyze which registers are available at the code position where the current cursor is located. That is, writing to these registers will not affect the execution of the previous and subsequent codes.

Starting from Android 11, third-party software cannot access the xxx folder due to system restrictions. You can try granting permissions to allow MT to access the folder. Click [OK] to enter the grant page, and click [USE THIS FOLDER] at the bottom to complete the process. "
PS: After turning on the shell permission, you can access the folder without authorization. It supports non-root devices. Please check the preferences for details!"
Force try using SAF to grant access

"Due to system limitations, you cannot access the xxx directory directly. However, there are two methods to resolve this issue: 1. Grant shell permission to MT by installing Shizuku and activating it. Afterward, restart MT. You can find the installation link in the preferences interface. 2. Grant root permission to MT. If your device does not have root permissions enabled, you can search online for methods to enable it based on your device model."
The version of the Files app currently installed does not support granting access permissions to the xxx folder. You can uninstall this update to resolve the issue.
Installation failed, the target SDK version of this APK is not compatible with your device!
Installation failed, inconsistent with installed APK signature!
Unable to downgrade the installation. Do you want to uninstall the installed high version application first? (You can turn off APK installation verification in preferences)
The apk needs to be signed before it can be installed. (You can turn off APK installation verification in preferences)
Prevent the apk file from being deleted by the system after installation. It may cause the installer to be abnormal on a few systems, please turn off this function in this case.
Install with Shizuku > Install with Root > Invoke System Installation
Only takes effect with root privileges.
Need to install and activate Shizuku.
The signature of the APK is inconsistent with the installed application. Do you want to uninstall the application first? (You can disable APK installation verification in preferences)
Verify the signature and version code before installing apk.

"Repackaging non-standard packed files in the APK and performing zipalign optimization may increase the APK file size.
NOTE: If only zipalign is used and the resource file is non-standard packed, the optimization will be ineffective."
Installation failed, please try to turn off MIUI optimization in developer options.

"You are about to install apks/xapk files in rootless mode. Due to MIUI's changes to Android API, there may be unpredictable situations that may cause the installation to fail.
If you encounter this problem, you can probably fix it by "turning off MIUI optimization in the developer options".
If the problem still cannot be solved after trying, then you can only install in root mode by enabling root permissions."
Installation timed out, no system response.
Installation timed out, please try to turn off MIUI optimization in developer options.
需要混淆的类（一行一条）
"混淆指定类 输入“完整类名”，如：bin.mt.plus.Main"
"混淆指定包名下的类（不包含子包） 输入“包名.*”，如：bin.mt.plus.*，此时会保护 bin.mt.plus.Main，但不会保护 bin.mt.plus.a.Main"
"混淆指定包名下的类（包含子包） 输入“包名.**”，如：bin.mt.plus.**，此时会保护 bin.mt.plus.Main，也会保护 bin.mt.plus.a.Main"
"排除指定包名或者类名 在表达式前面增加 ! 即可，如：!bin.mt.plus.*、!bin.mt.plus.Main"
如果启用了签名校验功能，则必须使用与原 APK 相同的密钥进行 V2 签名，否则安装后应用程序将无法正常运行。
该限制针对的是 APP 中受保护的类与方法的数量。您在提交处理任务时，需要指定哪些类受保护，而这些类的数量不得超出限制，这些类中所有的方法数量不得超过限制。
类数量与方法数量说明
未匹配到任何需要混淆的类！
添加签名校验(不支持XP模块)
一共有%1$d个类和%2$d个方法需要混淆，超出了当前服务套餐限制，请升级服务套餐或者减少需要混淆的类。
您本周的保护次数已全部用完，请下周一再尝试。
是否从服务器删除该任务记录？
是否重新尝试提交该任务？
是否重新尝试上传该任务？
本地数据包丢失或损坏
请点击右下角添加任务
您已尝试过重新提交该任务，无法再次提交，请联系作者处理该问题！

"If you want to apply for account cancellation, please use your currently bound email %1$s to send a cancellation request to the customer service email contact@binmt.cc.
Title: Application to cancel MT account %2$s Content: Screenshot of user information, your other additional notes (optional).
If your currently bound email address is unavailable, you can use other email addresses to send the application, but you need to provide your account password in the email content. If the VIP of the account has not expired, you also need to provide additional payment records when purchasing VIP.
Customer service will process your application within 7 working days. After the account is successfully cancelled, we will delete the information associated with the account."
It was detected that the resource names was obfuscated in the arsc file, so that some resource id transitions were automatically disabled
The entry with this ID already exists.
The maximum ID can only be %04X.
The file %s is missing, which may cause compilation failure!
You can place the resources.arsc and xml files in the same directory to turn on the resource id to name function
Cannot find the id corresponding to %s
You can open the signature settings by long holding the button.
When opening the file, if the text length exceeds the specified length, the smooth mode will be automatically turned on.
File contents cannot be compiled after replacement: %s
Function entry: APK Information > Function > Xml Batch Replace
The search type Xml is only available to VIP, please choose another option!

Starting from Android 13, all folders in the xxx directory need to be granted access individually. For your convenience, you can click the menu in the upper right corner of the directory to grant access in batches.
You can pull out the bookmarks by sliding up from the bottom-toolbar. If you often conflict with the full screen gestures when sliding up, you can increase the bottom margin appropriately.
This is a new smali file or the file was moved
After changing the launcher icon, MT will exit, and the launcher icon position may change. Do you want to continue?
Do you want to save the changes made?
Checking for a new version, please wait
Check if the format control characters (such as %s, %1$d, etc.) are translated correctly.
Do you want to clear all data of %s ?
Do you want to clear all logs?
Are you sure you want to clear all search results?
Restoring data using merge mode will retain data such as current bookmarks and network storages, only updating and replacing the current data.
You have not made any backups.
Restore your cloud data to your local device.
Back up your local data to the cloud.
Drag to sort after long press.
There are many differences between these two files, calculating the differences may take a long time, do you want to continue?
Only text files can be compared
The compared files can not be larger than %s
This operation will lose your current modification content. Do you want to continue?
The selected text is too large to copy
The current image file is not in 9-patch format, do you want to convert it?
If you do not have root privileges, you need to turn off this option, otherwise the session creation will fail.
"Use Smali syntax, one method per line, such as: Lxxx/StringFog;->decrypt([B[B)Ljava/lang/String;"
Please enter a custom decryption method!
This decryption method is not supported：%s
After modifying the directory path, the files in the original folder will not be automatically transferred, and you need to move them manually.
Command used to request root permission, leave blank for automatic identification.
Customize the RSA/SF filename generated by V1 signature, leave blank to get information from signature key.
"The processing is successful, you can click Details to view the specific optimization content. "

"When you package an apk file into itself, the size of the entire apk file will be doubled. At this time, many data of the external apk and the internal apk are duplicated, resulting in a waste of space. "For such apk files, after using this function to optimize, the file size can be reduced to close to the original size.
Decompile failed. Please check your internet connection
The default signature is easy to cause the APK to report poison, it is recommended to use a custom signature!
"Delete group \"%s\"? Bookmarks in this group will be moved to the default group after being deleted"
"Do you want to delete the local storage \"%s\"? (This operation only deletes records, not files)"
"Do you want to delete the selected %d local storages? (This operation only deletes records, not files)"
Do you want to use \"%s\" as your developer name? Once registered, you will not be able to change it.
The developer name will be displayed on the plugin information page, and the developer name will not be changed after registration.
You are deleting the plugin \"%s\". This operation cannot be undone. To confirm the deletion, please enter the calculation result:
Do you want to suspend the plugin \"%s\"?
You have not published any plugins.
You are not a plugin developer, do you register now?
Do you want to convert this dex file to a jar file?
Do you want to convert this dex file to smali files?

"Some apks confuse dex with symbolic names that are difficult to distinguish with the naked eye, such as Oo0, whitespace, etc., making it difficult to code analysis.
This function can quickly re-confuse dex, rename these special symbol names to easily identifiable names, and eliminate visual interference.
In addition, MT will try to fix the code of Java reflection operation, but if the strings is encrypted, it may cause the repair to fail. In this case, decrypt the strings first, or use recovery mode before installing and running."

"Recovery mode is the reverse operation of normal mode, this mode restores the apk processed in normal mode to its original symbolic name.
This process needs to read the mapping file, so make sure there is a mapping file in the apk.
If the apk processed in the normal mode can not be started, but you still want to modify it, you can try to use the recovery mode after the modification, and then install and run it."
Create a backup for the current modification status, just like the SaveData when you play games~
Did you want to revert to backup \"%s\"? The current modification status will be lost after this operation.
The processing is successful, you can click Details to view the specific changes.
Try to restore the encrypted strings in Dex. A number of string encryption tools are currently supported.
Cannot generate dex as the number of methods in a single dex exceeds 65536. Please try using the \"DEX Redivide\" function to process the apk file in advance.
Cannot generate dex as the number of methods in a single dex exceeds 65536.
Merge failed, too many field references in Dex. You can try to merge fewer dex files or use the Dex Redivide function of the apk to process.
Merge failed, too many method references in Dex. You can try to merge fewer dex files or use the Dex Redivide function of the apk to process.
Note: Assign the code to each dex as evenly as possible. If the number of dex is too small and the number of codes is too large, processing may fail. In this case, increase the number of dex.

Note: Limit the number of methods in each dex, the maximum is 65536, the greater the limit, the fewer the number of dex generated, and the more the contrary. If there are no special requirements, it is recommended to enter 64000 to make room for subsequent dex modification.
If multiple dex files are generated after processing, the app will not run on systems with Android versions below 5.0.

This function can repair the dex file format corruption within a certain range and remove invalid data in the dex file. (for example, some encryption will add special data to the dex so that the dex file cannot be processed normally)
Do you want to repair the %d selected dex files?
"Can't find the resources.arsc file, you can copy it into the data folder of the project directory."
"Set a list of paths that need to be excluded from the search range, one per line, for example: %s Attention! The exclusion list only takes effect when the search path is empty or \"/\"!"
If you want to be compatible with the Dex editor, please select the dex 035 version.
VIP members can add more dictionaries
Show \"permission + size\" for file in non-storage path.
Show \"time + size\" for file in all path.
Double confirmation is required before using Shizuku or Root to install an apk.
You have turned on \"Theme follows system\". Do you want to turn it off and switch themes manually?
Word wrap needs to be turned on to display the rest of this line!!!
This email is bound to multiple accounts, please log in with your username
It is recommended to activate email to prevent account theft!
Check if file has been deleted
After detecting that the file is deleted, you will be prompted whether to remove the file from the editor.
Check if file has been modified
After detecting that the file has been modified, you will be prompted whether to reload the file.
If enabled, you need to click the back button twice to exit
Failed to open the setup interface. Please go to the Settings manually to enable the floating window permission for MT Manager.
Extreme compression: The data is recompressed using the ultra compression algorithm to obtain a smaller size, and this processing step requires a long waiting time.
Tool file has been saved to \"SDCard/MT2/MTkeytool.zip\"
Do you want to extract the %d apk files you selected?
The name pattern must contain at least one variable!
"{A} Application name {P} Package name {V} Version name {C} Version code"
Do you want to extract app icons?
Please extract the file to the local directory before doing so
This feature is only available with root privileges.
This feature is only available for VIPs
The file %s is already in the editor
The file %s has been modified. Do you want to reload it?
The file has been saved to %s
The file \"%s\" already exists. Do you want to overwrite it?
The file already exists, do you want to replace it?
Do you want to compile and save the file?
Do you want to save the file?
The file %s has been deleted. Do you need to keep it in the editor?
File size priority: Pack all files as compressed as possible to reduce size.
Do you want to compile and save those files?
You can long press the \"Synchronize\" button at the bottom to invoke the filtering function.
Floating ball stick to the edge after 3s of inactivity

"* The function menus refers to the menus that some functions will appear under certain circumstances, such as the goto function menu of Dex Editor plus; * The second-level menus needs to be expanded to be visible. If the screen width is not enough to fit all the first-level menus, the first-level menus that exceeds the width will also be placed in the second-level menus."
The flow chart content is too complicated to display.
The following files have been modified, do you want to upload them?
Testing list file… (If you get stuck in this step, try switching the active/passive mode.)
The full class name has been copied to the clipboard.
The full path has been copied to the clipboard.
This function is only available on Android 5.0+ systems.
Automatically rename the original file to a .bak backup file when saving the file.
Only lifetime VIPs can get a free forum invitation code!
"This is your forum invitation code: %s A lifetime VIP can get a free invitation code. The invitation code can only be used once. Forum URL: bbs.binmt.cc"
Failed to get invitation code, please try again later!
Text has been copied to the clipboard
Hex Editor is a VIP feature. You can still try out all the features, but you cannot save the changes.

"After the local storage is hidden, it is just not displayed in the side bar, you can still access it through the path (such as bookmarks), if you want to restore the display, you need to add it again. Do you want to hide %s anyway?"
"Don't display spaces which are not adjacent to other blank symbols."
Entry ID has been copied to the clipboard
Image files larger than %s will not load thumbnails.

"1. Copy the .jks or .keystore file used to sign the apk on computer to your phone. If you don't have this file, you can click 「GENERATE KEY」 below.
2. Locate the file in the MT and open it, enter the password, alias, alias password (consistent with the information you entered when generating the file), and click OK.
3. Finally, choose whether to set a password as needed. (By default, the imported signature can be used directly, no need to fill in the above information again, if you feel unsafe, you can set a password)"
The imported signature key is stored in a local folder and is susceptible to theft, leading to key leakage. If this is a concern, please add protection!

Encrypt with a secure, lengthy password to guard against brute-force attacks. The encrypted file is stored locally, and the password is stored on the MT server. Simply log in to your current MT account to use the key.
Use a password to encrypt the file and store it locally. You need to record the password and enter it when using it. The security of this protection method depends on the complexity of the password!
No protection (easy to use but not safe)
"Avoid using the unprotected method unless you're unconcerned about the risk of key theft!"
"The signature was successfully imported and the file was saved to: %s"
Prompt: If the number of registers after the increase is not greater than 16, it is recommended to directly modify the number following .register instead of using this function!

This function exports the file operation interface of the data directory by injecting a specially constructed DocumentsProvider into the APK file, combined with the local storage function of MT, to achieve root-free access and modification of the data directory.

After installing the processed APK, you need to click the Add Local Storage menu in the side bar of the MT main interface, and then find the APP in the side bar of the newly pop-up interface and complete the addition.
If the custom log file path has no write permission, the file will be saved to /data/data/[PACKAGE]/logs/[TIME].log
Rewrite source file and line number
"Inject into the specified classes Enter the \"full class name\", such as: bin.mt.plus.Main"
"Inject into the specified packages (excluding sub-packages) Enter \"package-name.*\", such as: bin.mt.plus.*, then bin.mt.plus.Main will be injected, but bin.mt.plus.a.Main will not be injected."
"Inject into the specified packages (including sub-packages) Enter \"package-name.**\", such as: bin.mt.plus.**, then bin.mt.plus.Main will be injected, and bin.mt.plus.a.Main will also be injected."
"Exclude the specified packages or classes Just add ! In front of the expression, such as: !bin.mt.plus.*, !bin.mt.plus.Main"
Input one rule per line. Leave it blank if injection is intended for all classes.
"$$ Represents a $ $S Indicates where to start the selection $E Indicates where to end the selection $T Represents the currently selected text"

"According to Google's request, we upgraded MT's targetSDK to 26, and used a new API to send files to external APP. If these apps are not upgraded in time, the files may not be accepted normally, resulting in the inability to open files in the MT through the external APP. You can solve this problem by installing the plugin provided by MT."
You are already a Lifetime VIP member
Do you want to convert this jar file to a dex file?
Preserve V2/V3 signature data when not signing
Keep the file in the editor
For newly opened files, whether to keep them in the text editor on exit for next editing.
Do you want to keep the file in the editor?
Prevent words from being cut off to the next line when word wrapping.
Incorrect password, or the file is corrupt

Disclaimer: This function is only used for APP security testing. Please do not use it for illegal purposes. We do not assume any legal liability arising therefrom. Using this function means that you agree to the declaration. If your product fails this test, you can click the open source link in the upper right corner to get the technical principle and its countermeasures.
Unable to get file list because the process of the application \"%s\" is not started, you can click OK to start it.
Failed to load, click to try again.
Loading failed. Please try again later.
Loading failed. Please check your internet connection
Did you load the last edited content?
Displays thumbnails for image and video files.
Thumbnails will be canceled if they do not load within %d seconds.

This function can automatically insert a log-printing instruction into the code that meets certain conditions. When the APP runs to the inserted position, the context information will be output to the specified file. This function can be used for tasks such as string decryption, key printing, etc.
Long press to open the menu
Can not find the mapping file
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Please select the text to be converted first
At least two language packs are required in the arsc file
No matching items were found between the two language packs
Please select two language packs for dictionary generation
The file has been kept in the text editor and you can find it in the sidebar the next time you open the text editor.
The current file has unsaved changes. Do you want to discard the changes and reload the file?
"Byte count: %1$d Character count: %2$d Word count：%3$d Chinese count：%4$d Line count：%5$d"
Can not move a folder to itself or subfolder: %s
%s results found so far. Are you sure you wish to continue?

If you change the class \"abc\" to \"def\", by default, MT will change the string \"Labc;\" to \"Ldef;\", and the string \"abc\" to \"def\". If the class name is too simple, the second type of string modification is prone to problems. At this time, this option can be turned off to prevent the modification.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
Are you sure you want to clear all the selected translated content?

"The Dex file contains duplicate classes and the following classes have been automatically excluded:
%s"

After multi-login is activated, your account can log in to the official version (package name: bin.mt.plus) and the beta/clone version (package name: bin.mt.plus.canary)" at the same time.
In this way, you can install two MTs on your device and log in to the same account; or install the official version on one device, install the beta/clone version on the other device, and log in to the same account.
Note: After this function is activated, MT clients with the same package name will still squeeze each other offline!"
You need to activate the floating window permission for the MT to use this feature.
The initial path to the network storage has been set
File \"%s\" has been modified. Do you want to upload the changes?
The corresponding network storage configuration was not found. It may have been deleted or modified by you.
Network storage path is not supported
MT serves content for streaming. Tap here to open the player.
Due to the need to modify the \".so\" file, the length of the package name must be kept unchanged
No default open method is set
There are no entries to add
Your MT is up to date
None of the classes have been modified.
Do you want to convert %s to dex file?
Only copy the color number part
Save your data traffic when turned on.
Only the payload.bin file in the full package is supported!
Long press the icon to set it as the default opening method of the file type, next time you can directly click the file to open it.
You need to save all the codes before proceeding. Do you want to continue?
This is an apk signed with the v2 scheme. Optimization will invalidate the v2 signature. You will need to re-sign it for installation after optimization. Continue?
The file is too large, and the paging editing mode has been automatically turned on. You can click the file name in the upper left corner to switch the paging!
Performance priority: Resource files such as images and audio will be packaged in the store method and aligned in 4K.
Please place the cursor in the method code
Play Store service is not available.
The plugin cannot be downgraded. Please uninstall the installed high version plugin.
Submitted successfully, information has been released!
Submitted successfully, the information will be released after the review!
You have not installed any plugins yet.
The plugin ID is malformed and can only consist of numbers, letters, underscores, and dots. It cannot start with a dot.
The plugin is not compatible with the current MT version, you can upgrade the MT to the latest version, or try to install the historical version of the plugin.
You need to install the new version of the plugin locally before you can update it.
The plugin must contain the default language.
Plugin function is only available to VIP members.
Submitted successfully, the plugin has been released!
Submitted successfully, the plugin will be released after the review!
"The current version of MT does not support the plugin SDK, please update to the latest version. (plugin SDK: %1$d, maximum support: %2$d)"
Please enter the update notes in the default language.
Submitted successfully, new version has been released!
Submitted successfully, the new version will be released after the review!
Set the modification time of files to the current time when copying/extracting/downloading.
Preserve the original modification time of the files when copying/extracting/downloading.
Please install the plugin you want to publish locally!
Update failed. Do you want to retry the operation?
Upload failed, do you want to re-upload?
Do you want to close all files above %s?
Do you want to close all files?
Do you want to close all files below %s?
Close the modified file directly without saving the content
Do you want to close other files except %s?
Do you want to close all unmodified files?
"Enter this into your computer's address bar:"
Manage your phone files remotely from your computer
This feature requires your phone and computer to be on the same local network (LAN)
Do you want to delete the selected %d bookmark(s)?
Do you want to delete the selected %d class(es)?
Do you want to delete the selected %d file(s)?

"If you change the package name \"com.a\" to \"com.b\", and there is \"Lcom/a/A;\" in the code of a certain file, but the file corresponding to this class does not exist in the current project, then you need to decide this Whether this class needs to be renamed in this case.
For example, the package name you renamed is the same as the package name of the system class, and the system class should not be renamed, so you need to uncheck this option."

"{P}: Filename prefix, such as abc in abc.txt {S}: Filename suffix, such as .txt in abc.txt {N}: A number that increments from N, the N needs to be a specific number, such as {0}, {1} {zN}: Similar to {N}, the difference is that it will be aligned with zeros. For example, rename {z8} will get 08, 09, 10, 11…
If you don't use the replace function, leave the text to find blank"
This short press function does not support repetition!
To access the files on your device, please manually grant \"All files access\" permission to MT. Click OK to enter the configuration interface, select \"MT Manager\" and activate the permission.
To improve file operation performance, please manually grant \"All files access\" permission to MT. Click OK to enter the configuration interface, select \"MT Manager\" and activate the permission.
As a file manager, MT requires the \"Files and media\" permission. Please allow this permission request.
As a file manager, MT requires the \"Files and media\" permission. Please manually enable it in the application settings.
Request root permissions at startup. After modifying this setting, you need to restart to take effect.
If root permission is not obtained at startup, MT will try to call Shizuku to obtain shell permission. After modifying this setting, you need to restart to take effect.
Requesting shell permission timed out, you can try stopping and reactivating Shizuku!
If you need to generate unique resource names, you can add {RAN} at the end of the custom name.

This operation will delete the corresponding image, layout and other resource files in the APK together. In addition, MT will ensure that an ID corresponds to at least one resource. If your selected items will delete all resources corresponding to a certain ID, then they will not be deleted. Do you want to continue?
Do you want to restore custom symbols to the default?

After reset, the project will be restored to the state when it was just created, and all modifications will be lost. It is recommended that you make a backup before performing this operation. Do you want to continue to reset the project?

"Search resource: @/? + resource name or hexadecimal id, such as @string/xxx, ?attr/xxx, @7f080001
Check color: # + hexadecimal color value, support four formats like #RGB, #ARGB, #RRGGBB, #AARRGGBB, such as #F00
Digital conversion: Just input the number (When the input value is a resource ID, the corresponding resource information will be additionally displayed), MT will recognize the digital format according to the following format.
Binary: Must start with 0b, followed by 0 or 1, such as 0b1101
Octal: Must start with 0, followed by 0–7, such as 0701
Decimal: Composed of 0–9, can not start with 0 unless it is negative or zero, such as 1234
Hex: Composed of 0-F, if it does not contain A-F, it must start with 0x, such as F0F0, 0x1234
Only decimal can start with a negative sign, all digital system are not case-sensitive.
Numeric parts can be added underlines or spaces for better readability, such as 0b1000_0000_1111"
The %1$s.bak has been renamed to %1$s and the original %1$s has been renamed to %1$s.bak
A file with this name already exists
A folder with this name already exists
Export the translation data to arsc when saving file
After saving as a project, your current changes will not be lost after exiting and can be reopened in the sidebar of the main interface
Please enter content or select \"match any value\"
Please select at least one instruction match
Please configure the method matching options
Please print at least one parameter
Script is running, do you want to exit?
Please select an action to perform
The number of search results exceeds the limit, the search has been stopped
Can only select consecutive classes under the same package name.
You can make continuous selections by long pressing two classes separately.
Swipe to select two files in the list, and it will automatically select all files between the two files.
Click two items in the list, and it will automatically select all files between the two items.
You can make continuous selections by long pressing two items separately.
The selected text is too large
Display spaces as dots and tabs as horizontal lines.
Only show bookmarks in the default group, to view all bookmarks, swipe up from the bottom toolbar.
The signature key is only used to sign the output apk.
Place your custom key file in \"SDCard/MT2/keys\".
To import the signature, just open the .jks or .keystore file with MT.
You need to login account %s to use this signature key!
Signing failed, you need to login account %1$s to use the signature key: %2$s
Your password is too simple, please change your password in time. In the future, we will forbid the weak password account login.

Switching to smooth mode significantly improves the efficiency of editing large texts. However, it may limit some input method features, such as copy and paste. Please note that this will not affect the functionality of the MT menu.
The target storage device you selected is incorrect.
Where you select is not the root of the storage.

"Due to system restrictions, you need to grant the MT Manager to obtain full access to the directory. After you click OK to enter the grant page, you can directly click the button at the bottom to complete the grant.
(If you have root privileges, you may be able to access the directory without grant. At this time, you can turn off Use API to access external storage in the settings to hide the prompt.)"
You have modified the contents of the string pool, do you want to apply the changes?
Swipe right to perform more operations

Due to system limitations, the execution permission for the MT data directory is restricted. As a result, you are unable to run your own Linux programs without root access. If you have such a requirement, you can download the targetSdk-28 version from the MT official website (mt2.cn) to remove this restriction.
Do you want to download and install the expansion pack?
New version of expansion pack found. Do you want to download and install it?
You can install the expansion pack later in the settings interface of the terminal emulator.
Installed version: %1$s (Latest version: %2$s, click to update)
Request for installation of expansion pack has been made. Please click the button below to continue after installation is complete…
Do you want to close the current session?
The terminal still uses black theme in day mode.
Do you want to close the current session and start a new one?
"If an error message appears after entering the 'su' command in the terminal, you can try typing 'su2' to invoke the system's original 'su' command."
The content of the current page has been modified, do you want to save it to file?
Text has been copied to the clipboard
Text not found (regex and match case on)
Text not found (words and match case on)
Search timed out, please refine your search expression and try again!
Swipe files can be selected directly
If you want to import multiple files, compress them into a zip file first.
No smali files were found in the archive!
No xml files were found in the archive!
Can not move to the same directory
The current grammar rules do not support the toggle comment operation.
You have not installed or enabled any translation plugins.
This type of archive does not support update operations, your modifications have been ignored! You can click the button below to locate the file you just modified.
Ignore and locate the modified file
Please install the plugin you want to update locally!
APK installation failed, call the system installer to install.
Use API to access external storage
Using the Document API to access external storage and USB device.
Use \"\\t\" instead of spaces for indentation.

"The MT Manager account is for personal use only, and users are prohibited from lending the account in any public place. If such a situation is discovered, the officials reserve the right to freeze the account! If you discover someone else lending an account, please report it to us. After verification, the whistleblower will receive a VIP key equivalent to the reported account, and your identity will remain confidential."
This MT account has already been bound to another %s account.
This %s account has already been bound to another MT account.
Change password success. Please login again
"Congratulations, your password has been reset to %s Please change your password immediately."
"New password can't be the same as the old password"
Login session has expired. Please login again.
Do you really want to log out?
The new email cannot be the same as the original email
%s login succeeded. Please register or bind the MT account.
Password must be longer than 6 characters
Please enter a key of 32 characters in length
"Email has been sent successfully. Please check your inbox for the code. If you don't receive it after a while, please check your spam folder."
You have exceeded the limit of password retrieval attempts for this month. Please try again next month.
NOTE: You can only retrieve the password twice a month
You have not set a password yet
Please set a password before you unbind!
Do you want to remove the binding?
Only alphanumeric numbers and underscores are supported
Username must be longer than 3 characters

"There is an error in the file in the compressed package and V1 signature cannot be performed. You can solve it by the following two methods: 1. In the signature setting, select the signature scheme \"V2 (Android 7.0+)\". (recommended) 2. Manually delete Compress the files in the package \"%s\" and then sign."

"* Once VIP is activated, you can use all VIP features of the MT Manager. The account is not linked to a specific device. You can log in from any device, but simultaneous login from multiple devices is not supported. * To ensure the long-term operation of the MT Manager, the VIP account is for the purchaser's personal use only. Sharing, renting, or selling the account publicly is prohibited and may result in permanent suspension of the account. * VIP content is considered virtual goods, and purchases are non-refundable. * If you encounter any issues during the payment process, please reach out to contact@binmt.cc"
Swipe up from the bottom toolbar to open bookmarks
(If your system supports full-screen gestures and you often accidentally activate the bottom gestures when sliding up, you can increase the bottom margin of the bottom toolbar in the MT settings)
Do you want to search for the usage of the overriding methods?
"%s Permission is denied in the current directory. You can copy the files to the SD Card first."
"%s Permission is denied. You can extract the files to the SD Card first and then copy them to the current directory."
File \"%s\" has been modified. Do you want to update it?
The following files have been modified, do you want to update them?
